title: Rain Through Leaves
description: Rain passes through Leaves and other perforated blocks
body:
> **NOTE:** _This mod is packaged as part of [Great Big World](https://modrinth.com/mod/great-big-world) and was made a standalone mod so that players can enjoy it separately. Do not download both with the intent of using them together._

# Rain Through Leaves
A simple mod that makes Rain visually pass through perforated blocks such as Copper Grates & Leaves.

> _This mod is free to use in modpacks with credit._
